images: images saved relating to data extraction
dataset_extracted: where to save the not processed data from ToposText
dataset_raw: where to save the not processed data from ToposText
shipwreck_path: path to the oxford shipwrecks dataset
all_ports_aoe_topos: where to save the degraauw merged file
roberta_data_path: where to save the data needed to train classifier
degraauw_data_paths: excel paths to the degraauw data and their AoE values
low: lower limit for descretizing shipwrecks count
high: lower limit for descretizing shipwrecks count
bplace_filter: filter dataset so only place descriptions in it (True/False)
sentence_model: sentence transformer model used in topic modeling
classi_finetune_model: roberta based model used for finetuning
